name: Autoresearch Task
description: Without modifying any existing source files or tests, create a single new test file 'tests/test_smoke_additional.py' that adds 5-10 new passing tests for pure utility functions that are currently untested. Before writing any tests, first run 'python -m pytest --tb=no -q' to confirm all existing 274 tests pass, then run 'python -m pytest --co -q 2>/dev/null | head -50' to find untested modules. Only proceed if the baseline is 274/274 passing.
